description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and a before_script that runs docker info and logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_JOB_TOKEN. Define three stages: build, test, release. In the build stage add build_ubuntu1604 and build_ubuntu1804 jobs (except master) that set DISTRO and TAG variables and execute `docker build --pull -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE:$TAG -f Dockerfile.$DISTRO .` then `docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE:$TAG`. In the test stage add test_ubuntu1604 and test_ubuntu1804 jobs (except master) that set DISTRO, TAG, and INIT variables and run `docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE:$TAG`, `docker run --name $CONTAINER_ID -d --privileged -v /sys/fs/cgroup:/sys/fs/cgroup:ro $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE:$TAG $INIT`, and `docker exec --tty $CONTAINER_ID env TERM=xterm ansible --version`. In the release stage add release_image_latest, release_image_ubuntu1604, and release_image_ubuntu1804 jobs (only master) that set RELEASE_TAG and TAG variables and run `docker pull $CONTAINER_DEV_IMAGE:$TAG`, `docker tag $CONTAINER_DEV_IMAGE:$TAG $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE:$RELEASE_TAG`, and `docker push $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE:$RELEASE_TAG`, using the variables CONTAINER_DEV_IMAGE, CONTAINER_ID, CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE, and CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE throughout.
